entities.name: Mirage
entities.raw_quote: The instructions for conjuring Mirage in the supplementary sections of the codex do suggest that the circle has a protective function...

entities.name: Raphael
entities.raw_quote: Sun.: Raphael — King Saytam [...] binding tongues

entities.name: Gabriel
entities.raw_quote: Mon.: Gabriel — King Almodab [...] friendship, favour of potentates

entities.name: Samael
entities.raw_quote: Tues.: Samael — ‘rex films dyabuli’ [...] enmity and hatred

entities.name: Michael
entities.raw_quote: Wed.: Michael — King Saba [...] freeing captives

entities.name: Satquiel
entities.page_ref: Table E (37g), Table F (5th hour), Table G (1st hour)
entities.raw_quote: Thurs.: Satquiel — Madrath, son of Arath [...] peace

entities.name: Anael
entities.raw_quote: Fri.: Anael — King Saabotes [...] friendship

entities.name: Captiel = Caffriel
entities.raw_quote: Sat.: Captiel= Caffriel — Hay ton, Assayby [...] binding locations

entities.name: Yafaa, Safaa, Alleya, Hayala, Haya, Halix, Hayul, Ataya, Hytoia, Saffetaba
entities.raw_quote: I conjure you angels by the name Yafaa, Safaa, Alleya, Hayala, Haya, Halix, Hayul, Ataya, Hytoia, Saffetaba...

entities.name: Coffossol, Remlestar, El
entities.raw_quote: ...Saffetaba, Coffossol, Remlestar, El, Lord God...

entities.name: Sarafem, Custyeli
entities.raw_quote: Hasten, Sarafem and Custyeli, and command Amaris...

entities.name: Amaris

attributes.role: demon or spirit commanded to carry out request

entities.raw_quote: ...command Amaris and his helpers, that they may quickly carry out...

entities.name: Adonay

attributes.role: divine name used in Kabbalistic-style conjurations

entities.raw_quote: In the name Adonay, Adonay, Eye, Eye, Eyu...

entities.name: Sadaye

attributes.role: divine name used in Kabbalistic-style conjurations

entities.raw_quote: In the name Sadaye, Saday, Cados, Cados, Cados...

entities.name: Cados

attributes.role: divine name used in Kabbalistic-style conjurations

entities.raw_quote: ...Cados, Cados, Cados, the high one...

entities.name: Haya

attributes.role: divine name used in Kabbalistic-style conjurations

entities.raw_quote: ...Ya, Adonay, Saday, Sabaoth, Hanath, Hu, Haxi, Ya, Ya, Ya, Marmalita, Abym, Yea...

entities.name: Eloy

attributes.role: divine name used in Kabbalistic-style conjurations

entities.raw_quote: ...Eloy, Arar, Eloym, Eloym...

entities.name: circle
entities.raw_quote: The circles have power to convoke the demons (no. 9) and to terrify them (no. 7).

entities.name: horsehide

attributes.use: inscribe circle for control over horses

entities.raw_quote: a circle may be inscribed on horsehide, and then it will exert power over any horses to whom it is displayed...

entities.name: myrrh
entities.raw_quote: ...with myrrh and saffron (no. 3); ...incense and myrrh (no. 11)

entities.name: saffron
entities.raw_quote: ...with myrrh and saffron (no. 3)

entities.name: cinnamon
entities.raw_quote: with cinnamon, pepper and agrimonia (no. 4)

entities.name: pepper
entities.raw_quote: ...pepper, abana [...]

entities.name: agrimonia
entities.raw_quote: with cinnamon, pepper and agrimonia (no. 4)

entities.name: sulphur
entities.raw_quote: ...or with sulphur fumes (no. 5); assandaron, sulphur

entities.name: marrow of a dead person
entities.raw_quote: ...with the marrow of a dead person (no. 8)

entities.name: incense
entities.raw_quote: ...incense and myrrh (no. 11); incense and myrrh in a thurible (no. 36)

entities.name: Indian wood
entities.raw_quote: ...fumigate the image with Indian wood and with red sandalwood...

entities.raw_quote: ...Indian wood and with red sandalwood
